name: Cream Cheese and Garlic Dip with Pita Toasts
recipeInstructions:
1. In a small bowl, mix together cream cheese, mayonnaise, lemon juice, garlic, onion, dill, and salt substitute. Add Tabasco to taste.
2. Cut the top off the bell pepper and remove the seeds. Spoon the dip into the hollowed-out bell pepper, cover with plastic wrap, and chill while you make the pita toasts.
3. Pita Toasts: Cut each round of whole-wheat pita bread into 4 equal wedges. Toast until crisp, then open each wedge and dust inside lightly with garlic powder. Arrange on a platter with the dip. Makes 12 wedges.
